# PartRenderer.Action

**Enumeration**

Action requested by the render context after processing an instruction

## Declaration

```swift
enum Action
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **PartRenderer.Action.continue**: Continue rendering
- **PartRenderer.Action.skip**: Skip this part (only in response to beginPart)
- **PartRenderer.Action.stop**: Stop rendering

## Conforms To

- Copyable
- Equatable
- Escapable
- Hashable
